label: Forager's Starter Pouch
description: A handful of common seeds to get you started.

label: Meadow Discovery
description: Word of the Sunlit Meadow reaches you. Warp there to forage sunpetals.

label: Keen Eyes I
description: +1 extra seed per forage (passive at L4).

label: Swamp Discovery
description: You learn safe paths through Murk Swamp.

label: Pumpkin Cultivation
description: You can now plant pumpkin seeds.

label: Keen Eyes II
description: +2 extra seeds per forage (passive at L8).

label: Glowmushroom Cultivation
description: You can now plant glowmushroom spores.

label: Master Forager
description: Renowned across the land. A king's purse for your trouble.
